abilities.name: Their Number is Legion
abilities.desc: Each time this unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate, you can re-roll the dice to see how many wounds are regenerated.

abilities.name: Implacable Eradication
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Dispersion Shield
abilities.desc: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Guardian Protocols
abilities.desc: While a NOBLE model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Hyperspace Hunters
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves within 18" of and visible to this unit, this unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must only target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

abilities.name: Flesh Hunger
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength, a successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Bound Creation
abilities.desc: While this unit is in the same unit as a CRYPTEK model, that CRYPTEK model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Systematic Vigour
abilities.desc: Each time a CRYPTOTHRALL model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and it is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Cryptek Retinue
abilities.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a CRYPTEK model (a unit cannot have more than one CRYPTOTHRALLS unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that  Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abilities.name: Whirling Onslaught
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If this unit made a Charge move this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Fabricator Claw Array (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly NECRONS VEHICLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Canoptek Swarm
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, select one friendly CANOPTEK SCARAB SWARM unit within 6" of this unit. One destroyed model is returned to that CANOPTEK SCARAB SWARM unit for each SPYDER model in this unit.

abilities.name: Self-destruction
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, if this unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can select one model in this unit to destroy. If you do, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of that model and roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is a VEHICLE. On a 2-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Chittering Swarm
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control  characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1). While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly CRYPTEK models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

abilities.name: Tunnelling Horrors
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

abilities.name: Evasion Engrams
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal Move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Shadowloom
abilities.desc: The bearer has the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Nebuloscope
abilities.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Shieldvanes
abilities.desc: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+ and a Move characteristic of 8".

abilities.name: Relentless Combatants
abilities.desc: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit, and this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Wraith Form
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Hard-wired for Destruction
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker your opponent controls, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Optimised for Slaughter
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with an enmitic exterminator that targets a unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), re-roll a Wound roll of 1. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a gauss destructor against a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this unit’s Szarekh model has 1-6 wounds remaining, halve the Attacks characteristic of that model’s weapons, and each time this unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Voice of the Triarch
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle round, select one Triarch ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this unit has that ability.

abilities.name: The Silent King (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of this unit's Szarekh model, improve that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

abilities.name: Triarchal Menhirs
abilities.desc: If this unit’s Szarekh model is destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining Triarchal Menhir models are also destroyed.

abilities.name: Reanimation Nodes (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly NECRONS INFANTRY unit is within 6” of this FORTIFICATION, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Ancient Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Deployment
abilities.desc: When this unit is first set up on the battlefield, its models do not have to be set up in Unit Coherency. Instead, each model must be set up wholly within 12" of one other model from its unit. From that point on, each model in this unit is treated as a separate unit.

abilities.name: Damaged Armour
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly NECRONS model makes an attack that targets that unit, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
